commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'aws s3 cp s3://yanxi-validation-788668107894/manifests/mooncake-efa-bench.yaml /tmp/mooncake-efa-bench.yaml --region us-east-2'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete -f /tmp/mooncake-efa-bench.yaml --ignore-not-found --grace-period=0 --force 2>&1 || true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation 2>&1'
